caption: A man is seated in a recording studio, wearing a black hoodie with the word "BOSS" in gold letters, a white baseball cap, headphones, and a gold watch on his left wrist. He is positioned behind a desk equipped with a professional microphone on a boom arm and a black mug featuring red and white text that reads "THE TALK OUT". Behind him, a white wall displays a repeating logo consisting of five gold stars and the words "UNION MUSTLE". A blue banner above him reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". The man is smiling and laughing, with his expression shifting slightly as he speaks into the microphone. Across the sequence, he remains in the same position, leaning forward slightly, while the scene remains static except for his facial movements and subtle shifts in posture. A small logo with a question mark and the text "THE TALK OUT" is visible in the bottom left corner.
